Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Owner, LLC is present. Represented by Donna Stern.
Attorney Daniel Stern for the plaintiff.
Defendants Cristal Alamillo, Melony Perez, Jamilah Burton are present.
Attorney Adam E. Nguyen for Defendant Jamilah Burton in limited scope.
Attorney Robb C. Adkins for Defendants Melony Perez and Cristal Alamillo in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Dec 14, 2015 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
